name: mxstermind-preview
description: Localhost preview server for the mxstermind SaaS branding wedge demo.

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.cf:build: npm ci --prefix web --include=dev && npm run cf:build --prefix web
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run cf:build && npx wrangler deploy --config web/wrangler.jsonc
